LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT STEPHANIE ARORA'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED. ALL FUNDS HELD BY THE LEVYING OFFICER ARE TO BE RETURNED TO MS. ARORA (JUDGMENT DEBTOR). THE COURT WILL PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976.

calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar May-03-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Attorney Jill Bates-Moore telephone number 510-482-2158 specially appearing for Plaintiff CACH, LLC.
Defendant Stephanie Arora telephone number 415-359-7608 in Propria Persona.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, DEFENDANT STEPHANIE ARORA'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is granted. All funds held by the Levying Officer are to be returned to Ms. Arora (Judgment Debtor). The Court will prepare a form of order.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
